# R.A.H. Solutions, LLC

Landscaping company in Edgerton, WI specializing in landscape installation, lawn care, hardscaping, concrete services, and year-round property maintenance.

## Business Information
- Owner: Robert Harried
- Phone: (608) 501-5123
- Email: rahsolutionsllc2@gmail.com
- Address: 262 County Road W, Edgerton, WI 53534
- Hours: Mon–Fri 7:00am–5:00pm, Saturday 7:00am–12:00pm, Sunday Closed
- Service Area: Edgerton, Stoughton, Janesville, Madison, WI — Rock and Dane counties, 50-mile radius
- Licensed: Yes
- Insured: Yes
- Founded: 2023
- Business Type: Family-owned and operated

## Services
- Lawn Maintenance
- Landscape Installation
- Hardscaping Services (patios, retaining walls, walkways)
- Concrete Services (driveways, patios, walkways)
- Shrub Trimming
- Garden Maintenance
- Mulching Services
- Sod Installation
- Lawn Restoration
- Spring Yard Cleanup
- Fall Yard Cleanup
- Snow Removal (residential & commercial)
- Excavating Services
- Residential Lawn Care
- Commercial Lawn Care

## Key Facts
- Family-owned and operated by Robert Harried since 2023
- Fully licensed and insured in Wisconsin
- 50-mile service radius from Edgerton, WI
- Serves residential homeowners and commercial businesses
- Free on-site estimates with no obligation
- 4.9 Google rating, 47+ reviews
- Air-entrained concrete mixes for Wisconsin freeze-thaw cycles
- Same-crew consistency on repeat service visits

## Services Offered
1. Lawn Maintenance — scheduled mowing, edging, seasonal care
2. Landscape Installation — full outdoor build-outs and transformations
3. Hardscaping Services — patios, retaining walls, walkways, outdoor living
4. Concrete Services — driveways, patios, steps, walkways
5. Shrub Trimming — shaping and pruning for health and appearance
6. Garden Maintenance — weeding, pruning, seasonal plant care
7. Mulching Services — mulch installation for moisture and weed control
8. Sod Installation — instant lawns with proper site prep
9. Lawn Restoration — core aeration, overseeding, soil amendment
10. Spring Yard Cleanup — debris removal, bed prep, lawn restoration
11. Fall Yard Cleanup — leaf removal, bed prep, winterization
12. Snow Removal — residential and commercial plowing, shoveling, salting
13. Excavating Services — site grading, drainage, utility trenching
14. Residential Lawn Care — programs built for homeowners
15. Commercial Lawn Care — scheduled grounds maintenance for businesses

## About
R.A.H. Solutions, LLC is a family-owned landscaping company founded in 2023 by Robert Harried in Edgerton, Wisconsin. The company serves homeowners and small businesses throughout Edgerton, Stoughton, Janesville, and Madison, delivering professional landscape installation, maintenance, hardscaping, concrete work, and year-round services including snow removal. R.A.H. Solutions is fully licensed and insured and takes a personalized approach — understanding each client's property, budget, and local Wisconsin climate conditions before recommending a plan.
